2d9abd31.question: Customer who prefer credit card payments are the most profitable
2d9abd31.headline: Customers who prefer credit card payments are the most profitable, producing the highest total revenue ($12,548,398), revenue per customer ($171.73), and average order value ($166.12).

2d9abd31.question: Does higher frieight amount lead to lower profit numbers?
2d9abd31.headline: Profit Per Order Statistically Stable; No Aggregate Evidence That Higher Freight Is Depressing Profitability
